faq.question: How do I create a beauty salon website without skills?
faq.answer: Promto uses AI — you describe the salon, and the system automatically creates a website with services, prices, and design.

faq.question: Can I add online booking for services?
faq.answer: Yes, the website has a ready booking form — client selects service, specialist, and convenient time.

faq.question: Will the website have a price list with prices?
faq.answer: Yes, a catalog of services with descriptions and prices is added to the website and easily updated.

faq.question: Will the website appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, all websites are SEO-optimized — the salon will appear in city search results.

faq.question: How long does it take to create a website?
faq.answer: AI generates the website in seconds. A complete website with content will be ready in 5–10 minutes.

faq.question: Can I connect my own domain?
faq.answer: Yes, paid plans allow connecting any domain to your website.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will do everything — from design to service catalog and booking.
cta_final_subtitle: Professional website with online booking — launch in 5 minutes without coders.
